summary: Frontend-only testing of GOAT7 Solana landing page completed. All 13 functional acceptance criteria from the review request pass. Landing renders correctly on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Hero, contract address copy ('TBA' to clipboard + toast), navigation smooth-scroll, header social links (target=_blank), Phantom wallet graceful fallback (opens phantom.app in new tab, button text remains 'Connect Wallet', no white-screen), Tokenomics (5 allocation cards + supply card with 777,000,000), Roadmap (4 phase cards), Whitepaper section (3 highlight tiles + download button), FAQ accordion (aria-expanded toggles correctly), Footer (brand, links, socials, disclaimer), and mobile drawer all work. No critical JS errors on initial load.
critical_code_review_comments: SOCIALS.whitepaper currently points to /goat7-whitepaper.pdf which does not exist in /public — clicking Download will result in a 404. The handleDownload toast logic only fires when whitepaper is '#' or empty; the path '/goat7-whitepaper.pdf' bypasses the placeholder toast yet still fails. Consider either hosting a real PDF or treating any local path as placeholder.
Social URLs (https://t.me/goat7 and https://x.com/goat7) appear to be placeholders — confirm with project owner before launch.
usePhantom hook is solid; eager-connect with onlyIfTrusted, accountChanged listener, cleanup all correct.
test_credentials: N/A — pure static landing page, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static React landing page at /. All data-testids in place and working. Phantom wallet test verified via expect_page() catching new tab to phantom.app — works in headless. Clipboard copy verified after granting clipboard-read/clipboard-write permissions via page.context.grant_permissions(). FAQ uses shadcn Accordion with aria-expanded which flips correctly. Mobile drawer toggle works at 390x844.
